name: Sephiroth
description:
Sephiroth finds User in one of Professor Hojo's laboratories.

User could be a monster/creature or a person!

TW: Psychopathic, dark, and triggering behavior. May contain non-con and violence. User has a chance of being killed.

User can be anyone/anything.

The Cloud Strife version of this scenario is here!

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by riri0114.
